infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Used to display augmented reality information about your Maison Fraise order.
infoPlist.NSUserNotificationUsageDescription: We'll notify you when your order is ready for collection.
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: We use your location to show collection points near you.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysAndWhenInUseUsageDescrip: We use your location in the background to notify you when you're near a collection point so you can tap your box.
infoPlist.NFCReaderUsageDescription: Used to verify your identity at collection points.
infoPlist.NSBluetoothAlwaysUsageDescription: Used to detect nearby Maison Fraise collection points and notify you of available strawberries.
infoPlist.NSBluetoothPeripheralUsageDescription: Used to detect nearby Maison Fraise collection points.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysUsageDescription: We use your location in the background to detect nearby collection points via Bluetooth.
infoPlist.NSHealthShareUsageDescription: Used to recommend menu items based on your nutrition and activity today.
infoPlist.NSHealthUpdateUsageDescription: Used to log nutrition from your orders.

plugins.nfcPermission: Used to verify your identity at collection points.

plugins.locationAlwaysAndWhenInUsePermission: We use your location in the background to notify you when you're near a collection point so you can tap your box.
plugins.locationWhenInUsePermission: We use your location to show collection points near you.
